I'll start by reading the file to understand the current code structure.

Now let me reason through the migration:

**Current state (v5):**
- `<Modal>` has props: `className`, `title`, `titleIconVariant`, `isOpen`, `onClose`, `variant`, `actions`
- Children: text content and an `<Alert>`

**Required changes per migration rule:**

1. **`title` prop** (line 40): Move from `<Modal>` to `<ModalHeader title={...} />`
2. **`titleIconVariant` prop** (line 41): Move from `<Modal>` to `<ModalHeader titleIconVariant={...} />`
3. **`actions` prop** (lines 45-66): Move to `<ModalFooter>` as children
4. **Children content** (lines 68-75): Wrap in `<ModalBody>`
5. **Conformance rule** (line 70): `Alert` must be inside `Modal` properly — wrapping in `<ModalBody>` satisfies this
6. **Imports**: Add `ModalBody`, `ModalHeader`, `ModalFooter`

Let me apply the fix:

arguments.after:
<Modal
      className="nhc-modal"
      isOpen={isOpen}
      onClose={onClose}
      variant={ModalVariant.small}
    >
      <ModalHeader
        title={t("Delete NodeHealthCheck")}
        titleIconVariant="warning"
      />
      <ModalBody>
        {t("Are you sure you want to delete {{name}}?", { name })}
        {error && (
          <Alert
            variant="danger"
            title={t("Failed to delete {{name}}", { name })}
            isInline
          />
        )}
      </ModalBody>
      <ModalFooter>
        <Button
          aria-label="delete"
          variant={ButtonVariant.danger}
          onClick={() => void onClickDelete()}
          isLoading={isDeleting}
          data-test="confirm"
          isDisabled={isDeleting}
        >
          {t("Delete")}
        </Button>
        <Button
          variant={ButtonVariant.secondary}
          onClick={onClose}
          aria-label="cancel"
          isDisabled={isDeleting}
        >
          {t("Cancel")}
        </Button>
      </ModalFooter>
    </Modal>
arguments.before:
<Modal
      className="nhc-modal"
      title={t("Delete NodeHealthCheck")}
      titleIconVariant="warning"
      isOpen={isOpen}
      onClose={onClose}
      variant={ModalVariant.small}
      actions={[
        <Button
          aria-label="delete"
          key="confirm"
          variant={ButtonVariant.danger}
          onClick={() => void onClickDelete()}
          isLoading={isDeleting}
          data-test="confirm"
          isDisabled={isDeleting}
        >
          {t("Delete")}
        </Button>,
        <Button
          key="cancel"
          variant={ButtonVariant.secondary}
          onClick={onClose}
          aria-label="cancel"
          isDisabled={isDeleting}
        >
          {t("Cancel")}
        </Button>,
      ]}
    >
      {t("Are you sure you want to delete {{name}}?", { name })}
      {error && (
        <Alert
          variant="danger"
          title={t("Failed to delete {{name}}", { name })}
          isInline
        />
      )}
    </Modal>
